tax:IRM.tax:Source: Deputy Director of National Intelligence for Intelligence Integration (DDII)

Tetragraph.TetraDescription: Civilian Protection Monitoring Team for Sudan
Counter Violent Extremist Organizations Framework Partners
Global Foreign Terrorist Fighter Network Exchange
NATO CFE Treaty on Conventional Armed Forces in Europe
Tetragraph.Notes: Per CIA, the code should be expanded to its individual members for the purposes of common country banner line roll-up. Treaty-related information releasable only to those NATO nations that are States Parties to the Treaty on Conventional Armed Forces in Europe (CFE).
This tetragraph is authorized for use in the DIA-sponsored NKIC exchange only. Please contact DIA/OPE for implementation guidance.
Per NGA, the code should be expanded to its individual members for the purposes of common country banner line roll-up.

Tetragraph.TetraDescription: Partnership for Actions in West Africa
European Union Stabilization Forces in Bosnia

Membership.Description: As of 15 March 2016, disclosure request should be referred to the original classification authority for a disclosure decision.

Tetragraph.TetraDescription: International Security Assistance Force for Afghanistan

Membership.Description: As of 15 March 2016, foreign disclosure request should be referred to the original classification authority for the disclosure decision.
As of 15 March 2016, any derivative foreign disclosure request should be referred to the original classification authority for the disclosure decision.

Tetragraph.TetraDescription: SOF Planning Activities in Afghanistan (also called "11-Eyes")
